templates.name: Freelance Website Launch
templates.description: A complete website build with discovery, build, and launch milestones.
templates.briefDescription: Design and develop a responsive marketing website with CMS handoff.

milestones.title: Discovery & Sitemap
milestones.description: Finalize scope, pages, and wireframes.

milestones.title: UI Implementation
milestones.description: Build approved UI screens and interactions.

milestones.title: QA & Launch
milestones.description: Cross-browser QA, content upload, and launch support.

templates.name: Freelance Product Milestones
templates.description: For product feature delivery with milestone-based payouts.
templates.briefDescription: Deliver a scoped product feature in three release phases.

milestones.title: Phase 1: Prototype
milestones.description: Clickable prototype and technical approach review.

milestones.title: Phase 2: Feature Build
milestones.description: Implementation and integration of approved feature scope.

milestones.title: Phase 3: Stabilization
milestones.description: Testing, fixes, and production handoff.

templates.name: Creative Content Batch
templates.description: Ideal for content creators delivering assets in batches.
templates.briefDescription: Produce and deliver monthly creative assets for social channels.

milestones.title: Content Calendar
milestones.description: Approve concept list and publishing schedule.

milestones.title: Draft Assets
milestones.description: Deliver first draft batch for review.

milestones.title: Final Delivery
milestones.description: Submit final edited assets and source files.

templates.name: Monthly Retainer Support
templates.description: Retainer structure for ongoing product or engineering support.
templates.briefDescription: Provide monthly product support, bug fixes, and maintenance.

milestones.title: Week 1 Deliverables
milestones.description: Backlog grooming and initial execution.

milestones.title: Week 2 Deliverables
milestones.description: Mid-cycle implementation and reporting.

milestones.title: Week 3 Deliverables
milestones.description: Second sprint delivery and validation.

milestones.title: Week 4 Deliverables
milestones.description: Final sprint closeout and monthly handoff.

templates.name: Growth Marketing Retainer
templates.description: For recurring campaign planning, execution, and optimization.
templates.briefDescription: Run recurring campaigns with weekly optimization cadence.

milestones.title: Campaign Setup
milestones.description: Audience setup, tracking, and creative launch.

milestones.title: Optimization Cycle
milestones.description: A/B tests and budget optimization.

milestones.title: Reporting & Next Plan
milestones.description: Performance report and next-month strategy.

templates.name: Security Audit
templates.description: Smart contract or application security review with findings report.
templates.briefDescription: Conduct a thorough security audit and deliver a findings report with remediation guidance.

milestones.title: Scope & Kickoff
milestones.description: Define audit scope, access credentials, and threat model.

milestones.title: Audit Execution
milestones.description: Manual review, automated scanning, and vulnerability analysis.

milestones.title: Report & Remediation Review
milestones.description: Deliver findings report and verify fixes for critical issues.

templates.name: Strategy Consulting Sprint
templates.description: Short-term consulting engagement with defined deliverables.
templates.briefDescription: Deliver strategic recommendations through research, workshops, and a final roadmap.

milestones.title: Discovery & Research
milestones.description: Stakeholder interviews, market research, and current-state analysis.

milestones.title: Workshop & Synthesis
milestones.description: Facilitated workshop and synthesis of key insights.

milestones.title: Roadmap Delivery
milestones.description: Final strategic roadmap presentation and handoff.
